data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the CRM sync requirement, but there is no evidence provided that confirms the successful integration or operational status of the CRM systems mentioned. The linked use case outlines the need for CRM synchronization, but lacks concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality is implemented. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of successful integration with CRM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho) for customer data.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for CRM sync
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the CRM sync functionality.
